questions.subject: Economy
questions.prompt: Which of the following statements best describes the 'ANNA DARPAN' platform introduced by the Food Corporation of India (FCI)?

options.text: It is a blockchain-enabled platform specifically for the traceability of GI-tagged organic products.
It is a microservices-based, mobile-first platform that integrates the entire food supply chain from procurement to sales.
It is a cloud-based ERP system designed primarily for the internal HR and financial management of the Central Warehousing Corporation.
It is a chatbot-based grievance redressal mechanism for beneficiaries of the Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana.

questions.explanation: ANNA DARPAN is a microservices-based, mobile-first platform by FCI that replaces the Depot Online System and integrates procurement, storage, movement, sales, and contract management. Option A refers to BHARATI's focus; Option C refers to Bhandaran 360; Option D refers to the ASHA platform.
questions.takeaway: ANNA DARPAN represents the digital shift in FCI's supply chain management from a legacy depot system to a modern integrated dashboard.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: ANNA DARPAN: Introduced by FCI, it is a new microservices-based (mobile-first) platform that replaces the existing Depot Online System. It integrates procurement, storage, movement, sales, labour & contract management enabling real-time dashboards.
